backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AyurGlow Secrets backend, implementing blog post CRUD, user profile management, and admin access control using authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the AyurGlow Secrets full build/deployment feature to its associated source files, components, and test requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining OKLCH CSS variable tokens for light and dark themes via Tailwind base layer, plus default border and background body styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, blog, admin) and wraps the app with QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button when a user lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Route guard component that shows a loading spinner while checking admin permissions and renders either the protected children or the AccessDeniedScreen.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sticky sidebar component for blog pages featuring a live remedy search bar with results overlay, popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category count breakdown.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a single featured blog post as a full-width image card with overlaid title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the post detail page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level layout wrapper that composes the Navigation, main content area, and Footer around child routes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop links, a categories dropdown, an admin link, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component for a blog post showing its thumbnail, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown overlay that displays keyboard-navigable search results with title, keywords, and category badge, navigating on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating blog post data (published posts, all posts, single post by ID or slug) and checking admin access, all wired to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that filters a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages by title, category, or keywords based on a search query string, returning matched results via useMemo.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including an AyurGlow-specific color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for AyurGlow Secrets displaying the platform's mission, philosophy, and offerings in styled card sections with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, publish, or unpublish each post, using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid alongside a sidebar, with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post fetched by slug, rendering the featured image, metadata, resolved HTML content with inline images, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post with a rich-text Quill editor, featured image upload, inline image handling, category/tag fields, and optional immediate publishing.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating all fields and images from the fetched post data and submitting updates via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: A page displaying four natural/Ayurvedic remedies for dandruff and scalp care, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards with a hero section.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: A page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies to prevent or reverse premature greying, including curry leaf oil, amla-henna packs, and bhringraj treatments, displayed as cards with full recipe details.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: A page listing four natural hair fall treatments (onion juice, fenugreek mask, amla-shikakai pack, curry leaf oil) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, shown in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: A page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including castor oil blends, aloe vera masks, egg-yogurt treatments, and hibiscus packs, each detailed with ingredients, steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: A page featuring five Ayurvedic hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi oil) with full preparation and application details.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static hair care category page displaying a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards (e.g., Hair Fall, Growth, Dandruff) that link to their respective sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Displays a static page of four Ayurvedic remedies (Fenugreek Seed Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon) for managing diabetes and blood pressure, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

A styled alternative diabetes and BP support page using Card components and a back-navigation link, presenting four similar Ayurvedic remedies with a hero section, medical disclaimer alert, and detailed preparation/benefits lists.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Renders a styled digestion and gut health remedies page with a hero section and four Ayurvedic remedies (Triphala, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin), each displayed in Card components with ingredients, preparation, benefits, and usage.

A simpler digestion remedies page listing four Ayurvedic treatments (Triphala, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a plain card layout without navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, styled with a green hero section and card layout.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a plain card layout with inline black color styles.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep remedies (e.g., Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Chamomile-Lavender Blend) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card-based layout.
A styled alternative to StressSleepPage featuring the same four stress and sleep remedies with a purple-themed hero section, back navigation link, and detailed card components.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Presents four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Water, Ginger-Green Tea) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a minimal card layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (immunity, digestion, weight management, diabetes/BP, stress/sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the AyurGlow Secrets home page, including a hero banner, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page that outlines data collection, usage, and user rights for AyurGlow Secrets, presented in styled cards with a hero header and back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays four natural acne and pimple remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using a blue-themed hero section and card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Renders a page of four natural anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (e.g., Multani Mitti for oily skin, Oatmeal-Honey for sensitive skin), with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment), each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays a page with four natural remedies for pigmentation and dark spots (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Orange Peel-Yogurt Pack), including a hero section, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency using Card components.
React page displaying four natural Ayurvedic remedies for skin pigmentation reduction, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin-care subcategory cards (natural glow, acne, pigmentation, anti-aging, DIY face packs) linking to their routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Static Terms of Service page for AyurGlow Secrets, featuring a medical disclaimer alert and multiple policy sections (agreement, website use, etc.) rendered in styled cards.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for resolving ExternalBlob URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values with resolved blob URLs for content display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, an AyurGlow custom color palette, custom font families, border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the AyurGlow Secrets application, recording schema version, existing features, and configuration flags for the build/deployment retry task.
